quality.description_clarity: High. The effect, limitations (direction only, 1 minute duration), and charge mechanics (regeneration, destruction on last use) are clearly defined.
quality.formatting_notes: The description uses markdown links for 'invisible' and 'attunement' which are external references, standard for some documentation formats but noted here.
quality.completeness: Complete. All mechanical aspects (charges, action cost, duration, regeneration, destruction clause) are present.

mechanics.effect: Know the direction of the nearest hostile creature within 60 feet. Senses invisible, ethereal, disguised, or hidden creatures.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: The mechanics are well-defined for a rare magic item. The risk of destruction on expending the last charge adds an interesting element of chance. Consistency across all tracked fields is confirmed.
